title: Panchang Validation Sample Method

method.purpose: Provide stable contract fixtures for AG74F static-engine result generation and validator wiring.
method.scope: Field integrity, location/date normalization, fallback routing, and output-shape verification.

required_controls: Each sample must use an approved expanded location id.
Each sample must include timezone from approved location records.
Each sample must include tithi, tithi_index, paksha, nakshatra, yoga and karana.
Each sample must carry non-authoritative regional method note.
